user_org_memberships_org_shape_check.name: user_org_memberships_org_shape_check
user_org_memberships_org_shape_check.value:
(
        ("user_org_memberships"."org_type" = 'partner' AND "user_org_memberships"."partner_id" IS NOT NULL AND "user_org_memberships"."vendor_id" IS NULL)
        OR
        ("user_org_memberships"."org_type" = 'vendor' AND "user_org_memberships"."vendor_id" IS NOT NULL AND "user_org_memberships"."partner_id" IS NULL)
      )

invoices_unique_draft_per_period.name: invoices_unique_draft_per_period
invoices_unique_draft_per_period.where: status = 'draft' AND supplemental_of_invoice_id IS NULL AND cadence <> 'per_ticket'

invoices_unique_supplemental_draft_per_p.name: invoices_unique_supplemental_draft_per_period
invoices_unique_supplemental_draft_per_p.where: status = 'draft' AND supplemental_of_invoice_id IS NOT NULL AND cadence <> 'per_ticket'

invoice_lines_generated_dedupe_uniq.name: invoice_lines_generated_dedupe_uniq
invoice_lines_generated_dedupe_uniq.where: is_manual_override = false AND ticket_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id IS NOT NULL

invoice_lines_generated_dedupe_null_sour.name: invoice_lines_generated_dedupe_null_source_uniq
invoice_lines_generated_dedupe_null_sour.where: is_manual_override = false AND ticket_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id IS NULL
